name: 24W Led Bollard Light AC 120~277V 3CCT
description: Features: Efficacy higher than 130lm/W with zero uplights while consuming 24W Round appearance for good decorative effect, with 3.5ft height Dark bronze polyester powder-coat finish. 120 degrees illumination with 80 CRI. 1-10V dimming and projected over 50,000 hrs life span. The operating temperature is -4℃ to 40℃. Optional emergency function for emergency needs. Robust ground cage pre-buried installation. UL/cUL wet location listed and DLC qualified. Applications: Suitable for building entryways, walking paths, pedestrian plazas, and any other location requiring a low-mounting-height light source.
short_desc: Product Specifications: Wattage: 24W Lumen Output: 3120 LM Color Temperature: 3000K / 4000K / 5000K Input Voltage: 120–277V AC Junction Temperature: ＜75℃ Efficacy: 130 LM/W CRI (Color Rendering Index): ＞80 Light Distribution Type: Type V Lamp Efficiency: ≥90% Operating Temperature: -40℃ to +40℃ Housing Material: Aluminum Alloy Equivalent To: 100–120W MH/HPS LED Lifespan: 50,000 hours LED Driver: UL Listed Driver Certifications: UL, CUL, DLC Warranty: 5 Years
